description: The Auras of Survivors who are healing or being healed are revealed to you when they are within a range of {range} metres.
name: A Nurse's Calling

description: While carrying a Survivor, your Movement speed is increased by {speed}% and your Terror Radius is increased by 12 metres.
name: Agitation

description: When you hook a Survivor, the Aura of the farthest injured Survivor is revealed for {duration} seconds. That Survivor suffers from the Oblivious Status Effect for 30 seconds.
name: Alien Instinct

description: After falling from a great height, your next Lunge Attack range is increased by {range}% for 15 seconds.
name: All-Shaking Thunder

description: While carrying a Survivor, the Auras of all other Survivors within {range} metres of your position are revealed to you.
name: Awakened Awareness

description: Your vaulting speed is {speed}% faster. Performing a Vault action calls upon The Entity to block that vault location for {duration} seconds. Only one vault location can be blocked this way at any given time.
name: Bamboozle

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: After hooking a Survivor, all other Survivors' Auras are revealed to you for {duration} seconds when they are farther than {range} metres from the Hook.
name: Barbecue & Chilli

description: While within {range} metres of a completed Generator, you benefit from a +5% Haste Status Effect that lingers for {linger} second(s).
name: Batteries Included

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: When Bloodlust activates, you gain the Undetectable Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Beast of Prey

description: When a Generator is completed, the Auras of all Survivors within {range} metres of that Generator are revealed to you for 5 seconds. When the last Generator is completed, the Auras of all remaining Survivors are revealed for {lastDuration} seconds.
name: Bitter Murmur

description: When hooking a Survivor, all other injured Survivors suffer from the Haemorrhage and Exhausted Status Effects for {duration} seconds.
name: Blood Echo

chapter: CHAPTER 6: A Nightmare on Elm Street
description: As soon as an Exit Gate is opened, the Auras of all Survivors inside the Exit Gate area are revealed. When you hook a Survivor while an Exit Gate is open, both Exit Gates are blocked by The Entity for {duration} seconds.
name: Blood Warden

description: Pools of Blood are shown in bright red and can be tracked for {duration} seconds longer than normal.
name: Bloodhound

description: Your action speed for breaking Pallets, Breakable Walls, and damaging Generators is increased by {speed}%.
name: Brutal Strength

description: After damaging a Generator, its regression speed is increased to {rate}% of the normal Regression speed for 60 seconds. A Survivor performing a Good Skill Check on it triggers a Loud Noise Notification.
name: Call of Brine

description: At the start of the Trial, the 3 Generators farthest from you are blocked by The Entity for {duration} seconds. The effect is removed prematurely when a Survivor enters the Dying State.
name: Corrupt Intervention

description: Survivors within your Terror Radius suffer from a {penalty}% penalty to their Healing speed and an increased Skill Check rotation speed.
name: Coulrophobia

description: Each time a Generator is completed, Coup de Grace gains 1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens. Consuming a Token increases the distance of your next Lunge Attack by {distance}%.
name: Coup de Grace

description: When a Generator is completed, all Windows and vault locations within {range} metres of it are blocked by The Entity for {duration} seconds.
name: Cruel Limits

description: Each time you hook a Survivor other than the Obsession, Cull the Weak gains 1 Token. All Survivors who are not the Obsession suffer a {penalty}% penalty to Repairing, Healing, and Sabotaging for each Token.
name: Cull the Weak

description: Your vaulting speed is increased by {speed}%. Pallet stuns reduce stun recovery by -15%. Blinds last +15% longer.
name: Dark Arrogance

description: When you hit the Obsession with a Basic Attack, your Terror Radius transfers to the Obsession for {duration} seconds and you gain the Undetectable Status Effect for the same duration.
name: Dark Devotion

description: When you search a Locker, the Auras of all Survivors within {range} metres of your location are revealed to you for 3 seconds. This perk has a 30-second cooldown.
name: Darkness Revealed

description: After hooking a Survivor, Dead Man's Switch activates for {duration} seconds. While active, the first Survivor who stops repairing a Generator before it is fully repaired causes The Entity to block that Generator for the remaining duration.
name: Dead Man's Switch

description: Whenever a Generator is completed, The Entity blocks the Generator with the most progress for {duration} seconds.
name: No Holds Barred

description: When a Survivor heals another Survivor for one Health State, the Healer screams and suffers from the Oblivious Status Effect when farther than {range} metres from the healed Survivor for 60 seconds.
name: Deathbound

description: The Auras of dying Survivors are revealed to you when they are within {range} metres of your location.
name: Deerstalker

description: Any Generator within a range of {range} metres that is being repaired by 2 or more Survivors is marked by a yellow Aura. This appearance lingers for 4 seconds after the Generator is no longer being repaired by 2 or more Survivors.
name: Discordance

description: After injuring a Survivor by any means, Dissolution activates for {duration} seconds. While active, the next Pallet a Survivor fast-vaults while in your Terror Radius is instantly destroyed.
name: Dissolution

description: Your Terror Radius is increased by {range}%.
name: Distressing

description: When a Survivor interacts with a Chest or Totem for the first time, it becomes blocked by The Entity for {duration} seconds and its Aura is revealed to you.
name: Dominance

description: After damaging a Generator, for the next {duration} seconds, the first Survivor to interact with it screams, revealing their location, and suffers from the Exposed Status Effect for 60 seconds.
name: Dragon's Grip

description: Reduces the duration of Pallet Stuns by {reduction}%.
name: Enduring

description: After damaging a Generator, its Aura is highlighted in yellow. When a Survivor enters the Dying State, all highlighted Generators explode and start regressing. Eruption has a cooldown of {cooldown} seconds.
name: Eruption

chapter: CHAPTER 6: A Nightmare on Elm Street
description: Each time a Generator is completed, Fire Up grows in power. For each Generator completed, gain a stackable {speed}% bonus to Picking Up, Dropping, Vaulting, Breaking, and Damaging.
name: Fire Up

description: When a Survivor is put into the Dying State, all other Survivors within {range} metres suffer from a -20% Hindered Status Effect for 10 seconds. This perk has a cooldown of {cooldown} seconds.
name: Forced Hesitation

description: When a Survivor performs a Protection Hit, they suffer from the Broken Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Forced Penance

description: Each time you damage a Survivor, Forever Entwined gains 1 Token, up to a maximum of {max} Tokens. For each Token, your Picking Up, Dropping, and Hooking speeds are increased by 4%.
name: Forever Entwined

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: Hitting a Survivor with a Basic Attack causes them to drop their Item. The Auras of Items dropped by Survivors are revealed within {range} metres.
name: Franklin's Demise

description: When you hook a Survivor who is not the Obsession, they become the Obsession and their Aura is revealed for {duration} seconds. The previous Obsession suffers from the Exposed Status Effect for 20 seconds.
name: Friends 'til the End

description: After hooking the Obsession, you gain the Undetectable Status Effect and a +10% Haste Status Effect for {duration} seconds. When the Obsession is unhooked, their Rescuer becomes the new Obsession.
name: Furtive Chase

description: When you hit the Survivor with the highest total Chase time, they become the Obsession. Performing a Break action while in Chase with the Obsession grants you a +7% Haste Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Game Afoot

description: After a Survivor loses a Health State, the next Survivor to perform a Good Skill Check while repairing within 30 seconds has their Aura revealed for {duration} seconds.
name: Gearhead

description: When a Survivor loses a Health State, they suffer from the Exhausted Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Genetic Limits

description: Each time you hook a Survivor for the first time, Grim Embrace gains 1 Token. When you gain a Token, all Generators are blocked for {duration} seconds. At 4 Tokens, all Generators are blocked for 40 seconds and the Aura of the Obsession is revealed.
name: Grim Embrace

description: When a Survivor stops opening an Exit Gate after it has reached {threshold}% progress, it starts to regress.
name: Haywire

description: After damaging a Generator, it becomes Compromised. When a Compromised Generator is completed, your Basic Attack cooldown is reduced by {reduction}% for 60 seconds.
name: Help Wanted

description: A Hex that erects a Hex Totem at the start of the Trial. When a Survivor loses a Health State, all upright Pallets within {range} metres of that Survivor are held in place by The Entity for 15 seconds.
name: Hex: Blood Favour

description: A Hex that activates when a Survivor performs a rushed Vault action. A random Dull Totem is converted into a Hex Totem and The Entity blocks the vaulted Window for the duration. A maximum of {max} Windows can be blocked at any time.
name: Hex: Crowd Control

description: A Hex that gains power from your Hook actions. Each time a Survivor is unhooked while you are more than 24 metres away, Hex: Devour Hope gains 1 Token. 2 Tokens: 10% Haste after hooking for 10 seconds. 3 Tokens: Survivors suffer the Exposed Status Effect. 5 Tokens: You are granted the ability to kill Survivors by your own hand.
name: Hex: Devour Hope

description: A Hex that activates when you injure a Survivor. The cursed Survivor screams periodically and reveals the Auras of all other Survivors who are not in your Terror Radius for 2 seconds.
name: Hex: Face the Darkness

description: A Hex that activates when you hook a Survivor for the first time, cursing them. The cursed Survivor suffers from the Oblivious Status Effect and the Hex Totem is blocked from other Survivors for {duration} seconds.
name: Hex: Fortune's Fool

description: Two Hex Totems are lit at the start of the Trial. When a Survivor blesses or cleanses one of the Hex Totems, all Survivors suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Hex: Haunted Ground

description: A Hex that converts a Dull Totem into a Hex Totem and highlights Generators by repair progress. When 4 Generators are completed, all remaining Generators explode and regress by {regression}%.
name: Hex: Hive Mind

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: A Hex that grows in power each time a Survivor is hooked, up to 5 Tokens. Each Token increases the regression penalty of failed Skill Checks by {penalty}% and progressively reduces the Skill Check audio warning timing. At 5 Tokens, no audio warning is given.
name: Hex: Huntress Lullaby

description: A Hex that activates once the Exit Gates are powered. If there is a Dull Totem remaining, this Hex is applied to it. All Survivors suffer from the Exposed Status Effect and you gain a {haste}% Haste Status Effect.
name: Hex: No One Escapes Death

description: A Hex that activates after 8 Basic Attack hits. A random Dull Totem is converted into a Hex Totem. The last Survivor hit is cursed and suffers from a penalty to all action speeds.
name: Hex: Nothing but Misery

description: A Hex that curses the farthest Generator. When a Survivor repairs it for 5+ seconds, your Terror Radius transfers to the Generator and you gain the Undetectable Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Hex: Overture of Doom

description: The Auras of cleansed Totems are revealed in white. You can perform a special interaction on cleansed Totem remains to resurrect them as Rekindled Totems. Each Rekindled Totem applies a stacking penalty of {penalty}% to all Survivors' Repair and Healing speeds.
name: Hex: Pentimento

description: A Hex that reveals Survivor Auras within {range} metres of Dull Totems. When another Hex Totem is cleansed, that Hex transfers to the Hex: Retribution Totem, including any accumulated Tokens, and then Hex: Retribution deactivates.
name: Hex: Retribution

description: A Hex that affects Generator Repair progress. All Generators that are not being repaired by Survivors regress at {rate}% of the normal Regression speed.
name: Hex: Ruin

description: A Hex that hinders Aura-reading abilities. Hitting a Survivor with a Basic Attack or Special Attack inflicts the Blindness Status Effect. The last {count} Survivors hit are permanently affected.
name: Hex: The Third Seal

description: Hex Totems grant this perk Tokens. Each Token grants a stackable {penalty}% bonus to Cleansing and Blessing speed reduction. A Loud Noise Notification triggers when a Survivor starts cleansing or blessing a Hex Totem.
name: Hex: Thrill of the Hunt

description: A Hex that activates after being stunned or blinded {count} times. When active, Survivors who stun or blind you are blinded for 1.5 seconds.
name: Hex: Two Can Play

description: A Hex that reveals Survivor Auras within {range} metres of any Dull Totem. When another Hex Totem is cleansed, its Hex transfers to Hex: Undying's Totem, including any accumulated Tokens, and then Hex: Undying deactivates.
name: Hex: Undying

description: A Hex that activates after a Generator is completed, lighting a random Dull Totem and cursing the Obsession. The cursed Survivor suffers a {penalty}% penalty to Repair speed.
name: Hex: Wretched Fate

description: When a Survivor interacts with a Chest or picks up an Item within {range} metres of your location, you receive a Loud Noise Notification and their Aura is revealed for 4 seconds.
name: Hoarder

description: After hitting a Survivor with a Basic Attack, Hubris activates. The next Survivor who stuns you with a Pallet suffers from the Exposed Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Hubris

description: When a Survivor enters a Locker, their Aura is revealed to you for {duration} seconds. This effect has a 30-second cooldown per Locker.
name: Human Greed

description: When you put a Survivor into the Injured State, all other injured Survivors suffer from the Oblivious Status Effect for {duration} seconds. This effect has a cooldown of 30 seconds.
name: Hysteria

description: After performing a Lunge Attack, the Auras of all Survivors within {range} metres of your location are revealed to you for 6 seconds.
name: I'm All Ears

description: When you put a Survivor into the Dying State, all other Survivors within your Terror Radius scream and reveal their locations for {duration} seconds.
name: Infectious Fright

description: After standing still for {duration} seconds, you gain the Undetectable Status Effect until you move or perform a Basic Attack.
name: Insidious

description: While carrying a Survivor, your Movement speed is unaffected by the carried Survivor's Wiggle effects and the Wiggle effects are reduced by {reduction}%.
name: Iron Grasp

description: Survivors who exit Lockers suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for {duration} seconds and scream, revealing their location.
name: Iron Maiden

description: Survivors in the Dying State have their Auras hidden from other Survivors who are farther than {range} metres.
name: Knock Out

description: After hooking a Survivor, the next Survivor you hit with a Basic Attack suffers from the Exhausted Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Languid Touch

description: At the start of the Trial, the Auras of all Survivors are revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Lethal Pursuer

description: After hooking a Survivor, all other Survivors suffer from a {penalty}% penalty to Healing speed for {duration} seconds.
name: Leverage

description: You are immune to being Blinded by Flashlights, Firecrackers, and Flashbangs. Survivors who attempt to blind you have their Aura revealed for {duration} seconds.
name: Lightborn

description: After damaging a Generator, Machine Learning activates. The first Generator you damage thereafter has its regression speed increased by {rate}% for 30 seconds.
name: Machine Learning

description: While carrying a Survivor, your Basic Attack cooldown is reduced by {reduction}%. Hitting a Survivor while carrying another pauses the Wiggle Timer for 2/3/4 seconds.
name: Mad Grit

description: When you unhook a Survivor, if you are more than 32 metres from the Hook, the unhooked Survivor suffers from the Exposed Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Make Your Choice

description: After damaging a Generator, for the next 30 seconds, Survivors repairing that Generator are faced with continuous Skill Checks. If the Survivor fails a Skill Check, the Generator becomes blocked for {duration} seconds.
name: Merciless Storm

description: Survivors repairing a Generator suffer from the Exhausted Status Effect. The Exhausted Status Effect lingers for {duration} seconds after the Survivor stops repairing.
name: Mindbreaker

description: While in a Chase, your Terror Radius is increased by 8 metres. Otherwise, your Terror Radius is reduced by {reduction} metres and your Field of View is increased.
name: Monitor & Abuse

description: Damaging a Generator causes the nearest Generator within {range} metres to be blocked by The Entity for 20 seconds.
name: No Quarter

description: When a Survivor opens an Exit Gate, you see their Aura for {duration} seconds. When all Exit Gates are open, this perk blocks both Exit Gates for up to 60 seconds. Each Survivor you have hooked adds 6/9/12 seconds to the block duration.
name: No Way Out

description: When a Survivor unhooks another, Both Survivors suffer from a {penalty}% Hindered Status Effect for 10 seconds.
name: None Are Free

description: After damaging a Generator, for the next {duration} seconds, if you down a Survivor, the Auras of all other Survivors are revealed for 5 seconds.
name: Nowhere to Hide

description: Survivors within your Terror Radius suffer from a {penalty}% penalty to the efficiency of their Item consumptions.
name: Oppression

description: When damaging a Generator, up to 3 other random Generators also start regressing. If a Survivor is repairing one of the affected Generators, they face a difficult Skill Check. This perk has a cooldown of {cooldown} seconds.
name: Overcharge

description: While in a Chase, you periodically emit a static blast in a {range}-metre radius. Survivors hit by the blast scream and suffer from Incapacitated for 5 seconds.
name: Phantom Fear

description: Each time you chase the Obsession and let them escape, you gain a Token, up to 3 Tokens. Each Token increases your Movement speed by {speed}%. Performing a Basic or Special Attack consumes 1 Token.
name: See How They Run

description: After hooking a Survivor, the next Generator you damage is instantly regressed by an additional {regression}%. Normal Generator regression applies afterwards.
name: Pop Goes the Weasel

description: Scratch Marks left by Survivors are slightly/moderately/considerably more visible and spawn slightly/moderately/considerably closer together.
name: Predator

description: When a Generator is completed, you see the Auras of all Survivors for {duration} seconds. When all Generators are completed, the Obsession suffers from the Exposed Status Effect and you can kill them by your own hand.
name: Rancor

description: Your successful Basic Attack cooldown is reduced by {reduction}%.
name: Rapid Brutality

description: After hooking a Survivor, gain a Token. Each Token grants a +{speed}% bonus to your Picking Up and Hooking speed. Tokens are lost when a Generator is completed.
name: Ravenous

chapter: CHAPTER 6: A Nightmare on Elm Street
description: Each time a Survivor who is not the Obsession is hooked, you gain a Token. The Obsession suffers from a +{penalty} second penalty to the Opening of Exit Gates for each Token. This perk has a maximum of {max} Tokens.
name: Remember Me

description: Each time you hit a Survivor who is not the Obsession with a Basic Attack, you gain 1 Token, up to 8 Tokens. Each Token decreases your successful Basic Attack cooldown by {reduction}%. Hitting the Obsession with a Basic Attack causes you to lose {loss} Tokens.
name: Keep Them Waiting

description: When a Survivor is hooked, all other Survivors who are on a Generator that has reached at least 50% progress suffer from the Incapacitated Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Scourge Hook: Floods of Rage

description: At the start of the Trial, up to 4 random Hooks are changed into Scourge Hooks. When a Survivor is unhooked from a Scourge Hook, they suffer from a {penalty}% penalty to Healing and Repairing speeds for 90 seconds.
name: Scourge Hook: Gift of Pain

description: At the start of the Trial, up to 4 random Hooks are changed into Scourge Hooks. When a Survivor is hooked on a Scourge Hook, the Auras of all other Survivors are revealed for {duration} seconds.
name: Scourge Hook: Hangman's Trick

description: At the start of the Trial, up to 4 random Hooks are changed into Scourge Hooks. When a Survivor is hooked on a Scourge Hook, the nearest Generator within {range} metres starts regressing.
name: Scourge Hook: Jagged Compass

description: At the start of the Trial, up to 4 random Hooks are changed into Scourge Hooks. Hooking a Survivor on a Scourge Hook grants all other Hooks within {range} metres the Scourge Hook property.
name: Scourge Hook: Monstrous Shrine

description: At the start of the Trial, up to 4 random Hooks are changed into Scourge Hooks. When a Survivor is hooked on a Scourge Hook, the Generator with the most progress explodes, instantly losing {regression}% of its progress and starting to regress.
name: Scourge Hook: Pain Resonance

description: At the start of the Trial, up to 4 random Hooks are changed into Scourge Hooks. When a Survivor is unhooked from a Scourge Hook, they suffer from the Haemorrhage Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Scourge Hook: Weeping Wounds

description: After damaging a Generator, it becomes Compromised. Compromised Generators that are completed by Survivors reveal the Aura of all Survivors within {range} metres for 5 seconds.
name: Secret Project

description: Whenever you interrupt a Survivor healing another, the healed Survivor suffers from the Blindness and Exhausted Status Effects for {duration} seconds.
name: Septic Touch

description: Your Field of View is increased by {fov} degrees.
name: Shadowborn

description: After a Boon Totem is blessed, you see its Aura. When you snuff a Boon Totem, the Totem is destroyed.
name: Shattered Hope

description: Wounds inflicted by Basic Attacks cause Survivors to suffer from the Haemorrhage and Mangled Status Effects. These effects persist for {duration} seconds after being healed.
name: Sloppy Butcher

description: Crows found near Generators will alert you with a Loud Noise Notification when a Survivor disturbs them.
name: Spies from the Shadows

description: After breaking {count} Pallets, the next time you are stunned by a Pallet, The Entity breaks it immediately.
name: Spirit Fury

description: While carrying a Survivor, any other Survivor within your Terror Radius suffers from the Exposed Status Effect. The Exposed effect lingers for {duration} seconds after leaving your Terror Radius.
name: Starstruck

description: You hear the Grunts of Pain made by injured Survivors {percentage}% louder. Survivors' Grunts of Pain are reduced by -25%.
name: Stridor

description: When a Survivor performs a fast vault within {range} metres, you gain the ability to vault 30% faster for 5 seconds.
name: Superior Anatomy

description: When you put a Survivor into the Dying State with a Basic Attack, all Generators within {range} metres of the Survivor instantly explode and start regressing.
name: Surge

description: All regressing Generators are highlighted in white. If a Survivor stops repairing a Generator, it is highlighted in yellow for {duration} seconds.
name: Surveillance

description: When a Survivor stuns you with a Pallet, all other Survivors within {range} metres scream and have their Auras revealed for 6 seconds.
name: THWACK!

description: When the Exit Gates are powered, Survivors who are injured, in the Dying State, or being carried suffer from the Broken Status Effect until the Exit Gates are opened. This effect lingers for {duration} seconds after the Exit Gates are opened.
name: Terminus

description: Survivors entering the Basement when you are more than {range} metres away will trigger a Loud Noise Notification and their Aura is revealed for 3 seconds.
name: Territorial Imperative

description: Each injured, dying, or hooked Survivor incurs a stack-able {penalty}% penalty to all Survivors' Repairing, Sabotaging, and Cleansing Action speeds.
name: Thanatophobia

description: After picking up a Survivor, all Generators that are not being repaired by other Survivors are blocked by The Entity for {duration} seconds.
name: Thrilling Tremors

description: When a Generator is repaired to {threshold}%, you receive a Loud Noise Notification and you gain the Undetectable Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Tinkerer

description: After damaging a Generator, you gain the Undetectable Status Effect for {duration} seconds. The Generator's Aura is revealed in yellow to all Survivors.
name: Trail of Torment

description: After hooking a Survivor, the Generator with the most progress is blocked by The Entity for {duration} seconds. Its progress is reversed by the amount progressed during the block.
name: Turn Back the Clock

description: After damaging a Generator, for the next {duration} seconds, Survivors repairing it suffer from a random Exhaustion perk being blocked.
name: Ultimate Weapon

description: After being stunned or blinded, your next Basic Attack has {range}% increased Lunge distance for 15 seconds.
name: Unbound

description: When a Generator is completed, the next Survivor you hook will have their Hook Stage progression accelerated by {speed}%.
name: Undone

description: When you damage a Generator, you gain the Undetectable Status Effect for {duration} seconds. The Generator emits a Terror Radius of 32 metres for the same duration.
name: Unforeseen

description: Survivors within your Terror Radius have a {penalty}% greater chance of triggering Skill Checks and have their Skill Check success zones reduced by 40/50/60%.
name: Unnerving Presence

description: Your successful Basic Attack cooldown is reduced by {reduction}%.
name: Unrelenting

description: When a Generator reaches {threshold}% progress, its Aura is revealed to you for 5 seconds. You gain a +5% Haste Status Effect for {duration} seconds after damaging a revealed Generator.
name: Wandering Eye

description: When picking up a Survivor, the Auras of all other Survivors within {range} metres who are not in a Chase are revealed for 3 seconds.
name: Weave Attunement

description: You occasionally hear the Entity's Whisper when at least one Survivor is within {range} metres of your location.
name: Whispers

description: The Auras of Pallets, Breakable Walls, and Vault locations are revealed within {range} metres.
name: Zanshin Tactics
